title: Curacao Spritz
description: A refreshing and sweet cocktail perfect for warm weather. This drink combines the flavors of citrus and almond with a hint of orange liqueur.
instructions: Fill a cocktail shaker with ice.
Add the sugar to the shaker and muddle until the sugar is dissolved.
Add the Curacao to the shaker and stir to combine.
Strain the mixture into a chilled glass filled with ice.
Top with soda water and stir gently.
